name: Minimalist Ceramic Mug
description: Hand-crafted ceramic mug with a matte finish. Perfect for your morning coffee or evening tea. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

name: Organic Linen Throw
description: Woven from 100% organic French flax. This stonewashed linen throw gets softer with every wash. Breathable, cozy, and effortlessly stylish.

name: Concrete Desk Planter
description: Geometric concrete planter ideal for succulents. Adds an industrial yet refined touch to your home or office workspace.

name: Leather Notebook
description: Full-grain leather bound notebook with 120gsm acid-free paper. Designed to age beautifully alongside your thoughts and ideas.
